content.en:
The real big chance?

Ye Tian suddenly looked forward to it, after all, the Star Ancestor had given a lot of good things before, such as treasures such as the Primordial Source Liquid, but now that he said the three words of Great Chance, I am afraid that it is even more precious than the Primordial Source Liquid, and even more precious than the Eternal Source Object of the Ancient Star Stone.

Soon, the main body of the Star Ancestor sent something out of the sealed place.

Ye Tian looked at it and found that it was a finger.

This section of fingers is sealed layer by layer, it looks simple and ordinary, but it can make the Star Ancestor call it a great opportunity, which means that this section of fingers is not simple.

This finger was about three meters long, which meant that the life body was not small, the finger was purple, and there were countless lines on it, which was not the finger of any kind of creature that Ye Tian knew.

Therefore, Ye Tian looked at it for a while and didn't recognize it.

"Xingzu, what is this finger?"

Ye Tian couldn't help but ask.

Xing Zu's consciousness touched this finger, a little reluctant, but he still handed it to Ye Tian.

"Xuchen, this finger is my most important opportunity, and even if I was able to create an ancient astral body, I have its credit. It is a finger of the life of the Eternal Realm, containing a trace of the power of the Eternal Realm, if it is not sealed, the breath of power alone is enough to shatter the entire Star Ancient Domain. StarClan recounted.

"Then why don't you use this finger to break through the Star Ancient Domain?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

Xingzu said with a gloomy face: "If I can do it, do I still need to cultivate you?" This finger was sealed by another Eternal Realm power, so there is no way to break the seal, even if the seal is really opened, with the power of the Eternal Realm, maybe I can attack indiscriminately and annihilate my body, and when the time comes, I will not be able to save myself but will commit suicide." "

"What's the use of it for me?" Ye Tian asked.

"Ignorance!" Star Ancestor said disdainfully: "Although the finger of the Eternal Realm power has been sealed, you can comprehend the finger of the Eternal Realm power, and you can casually gain a little understanding, which is a great opportunity." If you don't want to find an Eternal Realm in the Source Sea, if you let the other Supreme Beings know that you have a powerful finger of the Eternal Realm in your hand, I'm afraid that even a half-step Eternal Realm will come to you for trouble. "

"Yuanhai can't find an Eternal Realm power, what does this mean?"

Ye Tian was curious.

"I don't know either!" Star Ancestor didn't seem to want to say more, so he changed the topic and said, "Maybe when you have the opportunity to ascend to the half-step Eternal Realm, maybe you'll know, it's useless for you to ask me now." "

Ye Tian didn't know if Xingzu didn't want to say it, or if he really didn't know.

But in any case, this finger of the Eternal Realm is indeed a real great opportunity.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian left with this finger.

After Ye Tian left, Xingzu said secretly: "Xu Chen, you have signed a contract, you can't break it, when you rescue me, I will give you death." This Eternal Realm finger is real, and it is also helpful for comprehending the rules of the Eternal Realm, and it can even make you have a lot of insights and improve your realm faster, but the faster your realm improves, the faster you must rescue me!"

If he hadn't signed the contract, he wouldn't have been able to give Ye Tian this piece of Eternal Realm finger of immeasurable value.

In fact, he is also very convening.

His great enemy could come at any time, so he didn't want to delay any longer, and getting out of the predicament as soon as possible was the most urgent thing.

---------------------

After obtaining a finger from the Eternal Realm, Ye Tian immediately decided to take this finger out of the Star Ancient Domain.

He copied himself when he was in the realm of the first-class Supreme One, and this copy body entered the Star Ancient Domain, and obtained this Eternal Realm finger from the doppelganger's hand, and then left the Star Ancient Domain, and took this treasure away silently.

It can be said that Xingzu's plan was completely frustrated, and if he knew, he was afraid that he would have the intention of committing suicide.

As soon as he entered the Void Source Hall, Ye Tian immediately took this piece of Eternal Realm finger to the machine spirit.

After all, the Void Source Hall Instrument Spirit is the instrument spirit of the Void Source Ancestor, a half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse, and he has seen a lot, maybe in some ways more than the Star Ancestor's knowledge, so maybe the Instrument Spirit knows more about the secrets of the Eternal Realm.

"Machine Spirit, what do you think this is?"

Ye Tian took out this finger.

The machine spirit stared at the finger carefully, and exclaimed, "Master, this is the finger of the Eternal Realm powerhouse, where did you get it?"

Ye Tian talked about Xingzu's matter.

After hearing this, the machine spirit couldn't help but smile and said, "Master, if this Star Ancestor knows that his Eternal Realm finger has been completely lost, I'm afraid he will die of distress. "

"Machine Spirit, the Eternal Realm Finger that Xing Ancestor said is very valuable, is there any other use?"

Ye Tian asked.

"There is also a very important use!" "The Eternal Realm power is an incomparably terrifying existence, even my previous master, the Void Source Ancestor, has never seen an Eternal Realm power, they are too mysterious, they don't even know how many Eternal Realm powers, but they definitely exist, because there are relics left by the Eternal Realm power in the Source Sea." This section of the Eternal Realm finger can be integrated into the finger, and others dare not integrate it, because once the fusion fails, they will definitely die, but the master can use the copy body to fuse this section of the Eternal Realm finger, and if you try countless times, there will always be a successful day. Once successful, the master has mastered a killer skill, such as using this Eternal Realm finger to perform a fingering supreme skill, which is enough to surpass the level and kill the top supreme. Moreover, once the master fuses this amputated finger, it is easier to comprehend more mysteries and benefits. "

"yes, it does work for me!"

Ye Tian nodded.

I have to say that the machine spirit is really smart, he didn't think of this method.

Subsequently, Ye Tian found a secret technique of fusing foreign objects from the inheritance of the Void Origin Ancestor, which could be used to try to fuse this finger of the power of the Eternal Realm.

In the following days, Ye Tian fused the copy body with this powerful finger of the Eternal Realm.

The first fusion.

Rumble!!!!

The replica body directly shattered, and the fusion failed.

Subsequently, Ye Tian copied a body again and began the second fusion.

Obviously, the second fusion failed.

Again and again converged, again and again failed.

For Ye Tian, this failure is nothing, he just loses a little resource.

Unconsciously, Ye Tian had tried countless times, and the outside world had spent ten great tribulations.
